ast.name: title
ast.source: Single-letter keyboard shortcut (skipped if conflicts with built-in)
ast.target: 单字母键盘快捷键（如果与内置快捷键冲突则跳过）

ast.name: title
ast.target: 已启用（取消选中以忽略此配置文件）

ast.name: title
ast.source: Optional. When set, opening a note in this domain switches to this reading mode.
ast.target: 可选。设置后，在此域名中打开笔记会切换到此阅读模式。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Built-in tags that survive subset mode.
ast.target: 在子集模式下保留的内置标签。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Replace all domain profiles with the bundled presets. This overwrites your edits.
ast.target: 用捆绑的预设替换所有域名配置文件。这将覆盖您的编辑。

ast.name: error
ast.source: sr: failed to write PDF sidecar
ast.target: sr：写入 PDF 侧车文件失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: sr: failed to write PDF sidecar (rect)
ast.target: sr：写入 PDF 侧车文件失败（矩形）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not parse message into JSON:
ast.target: 无法将消息解析为 JSON：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where the tag picker appears when you select text. "Auto" floats above the selection; the corner options pin it to the active pane. "Invisible" hides the picker entirely — tag the selection with the letter shortcut, no UI shown.
ast.target: 选择文本时标签选择器出现的位置。“自动”浮动在选区上方；角落选项将其固定到活动窗格。“隐藏”完全隐藏选择器 — 使用字母快捷键为选区添加标签，不显示 UI。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where auto-generated concept hub pages live.
ast.target: 自动生成的概念中心页面存放位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where the auto-generated open-questions index lives.
ast.target: 自动生成的开放问题索引存放位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When a note changes, regenerate the affected hub pages. Off by default — run "Rebuild concept hub pages" manually instead.
ast.target: 当笔记更改时，重新生成受影响的中心页面。默认关闭 — 请改为手动运行“重建概念中心页面”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag suggestion, consistency check, synthesis. Requires an Anthropic API key.
ast.target: 标签建议、一致性检查、综合。需要 Anthropic API 密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stored in plugin data. Never written to vault files.
ast.target: 存储在插件数据中。从不写入保险库文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Forget FSRS scheduling for every card. Cannot be undone.
ast.target: 忘记所有卡片的 FSRS 调度。此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Created on first sync if missing.
ast.target: 如果缺失，则在首次同步时创建。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When selecting text inside an Obsidian PDF view, the tagbar appears just like in markdown. Picks are saved to a colocated sidecar (<name>.sr.md) that the indexer, hubs, cards, and MCP already understand.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian PDF 视图内选择文本时，标签栏会像在 Markdown 中一样出现。选择结果保存到同位侧车文件（<name>.sr.md），索引器、中心、卡片和 MCP 已经能够理解该文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: readwise.io → Settings → Access Token. Stored in plugin data.
ast.target: readwise.io → 设置 → 访问令牌。存储在插件数据中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative. Created if missing. Used for both Readwise and Kindle imports.
ast.target: 相对于保险库。如果缺失则创建。用于 Readwise 和 Kindle 导入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: ISO timestamp passed to Readwise as `updatedAfter`. Empty = full sync next run.
ast.target: 传递给 Readwise 的 ISO 时间戳，作为 `updatedAfter`。留空 = 下次运行时进行完整同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Todoist uses the REST API. Things 3 uses x-callback-url on macOS/iOS.
ast.target: Todoist 使用 REST API。Things 3 在 macOS/iOS 上使用 x-callback-url。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Todoist → Settings → Integrations → Developer → API token. Stored in plugin data.
ast.target: Todoist → 设置 → 集成 → 开发者 → API 令牌。存储在插件数据中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Forget which actions have already been pushed. Used by Things (which can't be queried). Next sync will re-push every action.
ast.target: 忘记哪些操作已被推送。用于 Things（无法查询）。下次同步将重新推送所有操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative. Defaults to `actions.ics` at the vault root.
ast.target: 相对于保险库。默认为保险库根目录下的 `actions.ics`。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Start an HTTP MCP server when Obsidian is running. Off by default — opening a port is opt-in.
ast.target: 当 Obsidian 运行时启动 HTTP MCP 服务器。默认关闭 — 打开端口是可选的。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default: 8745. Change if it collides with another service.
ast.target: 默认值：8745。如果与其他服务冲突，请更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Off by default. When off, read-only tools work but write tools (sr_apply_tag, sr_review_card, sr_rebuild_hubs, sr_export_markdown) are hidden and refused — clients can read your vault but not change it.
ast.target: 默认关闭。关闭时，只读工具可用，但写入工具（sr_apply_tag、sr_review_card、sr_rebuild_hubs、sr_export_markdown）将被隐藏并拒绝使用——客户端可以读取您的保险库，但无法修改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Copy a sample Claude Desktop / Cursor MCP server config to clipboard.
ast.target: 将示例 Claude Desktop / Cursor MCP 服务器配置复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 编辑时自动重建枢纽页面

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在 PDF 视图中启用标签功能

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Inject summary on today's daily note
ast.target: 在今日每日笔记中注入摘要

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Type a sigil to filter — e.g. "Q " for questions, "Def cog" for concept "cog…"
ast.target: 输入一个符号进行过滤——例如 \"Q \" 表示问题，\"Def cog\" 表示概念 \"cog…\"

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [sr-mcp] MCP server only runs on desktop Obsidian; ignoring.
ast.target: [sr-mcp] MCP 服务器仅在桌面版 Obsidian 上运行；已忽略。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Hub page not generated yet — run "Rebuild concept hubs".
ast.target: 枢纽页面尚未生成——请运行“重建概念枢纽”。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Suggested span not found verbatim in paragraph; skipping.
ast.target: 在段落中未逐字找到建议的跨度；已跳过。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Configure your Anthropic API key in plugin settings first.
ast.target: 请先在插件设置中配置您的 Anthropic API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Configure your Anthropic API key first.
ast.target: 请先配置您的 Anthropic API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Set your Readwise token in plugin settings first.
ast.target: 请先在插件设置中设置您的 Readwise 令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Pick a tasks provider in plugin settings first.
ast.target: 请先在插件设置中选择一个任务提供商。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No cards to sync — tag some Defs or Qs first.
ast.target: 没有可同步的卡片——请先为一些定义或问题添加标签。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有可导出的已标记跨度。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Copied MCP config snippet to clipboard.
ast.target: 已将 MCP 配置代码片段复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 人物 / 事物 / 标题

ast.name: desc
ast.source: X causes / supports / depends on Y
ast.target: X 导致 / 支持 / 依赖于 Y

ast.name: desc
ast.source: data / case that supports a relation
ast.target: 支持关系的数据 / 案例

ast.name: desc
ast.source: how to know it worked (signal / prediction)
ast.target: 如何知道有效（信号/预测）

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 目标语言词或短语（卡片锚点）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: L1 meaning of an L2 span

ast.name: desc
ast.source: pronunciation / IPA for an L2 span

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 可复用的语法模式实例

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 认识单词但错过了结构

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 解码了字面意思但错过了意图

ast.name: desc
ast.source: stop reading passively, surface obvious anchors
ast.target: 停止被动阅读，标出明显锚点

ast.name: desc
ast.source: separate information by role, not just content
ast.target: 按角色而非仅内容分离信息

ast.name: desc
ast.source: perceive the structure the author does not state
ast.target: 感知作者未明言的结构

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 经文引用（书卷 章:节）

ast.name: description
ast.source: List every Mention of a tag across the vault. Tag sigils: Def, Q, A, R, M, C, B, L, T, X, N, D, P, Mn, Ex, An, Ev, Opp, Assump, or any user-defined custom tag.
ast.target: 列出整个库中每个标签的所有提及。标签符号：Def, Q, A, R, M, C, B, L, T, X, N, D, P, Mn, Ex, An, Ev, Opp, Assump，或任何用户自定义的自定义标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All concept (Def) hub entries with mention counts and top co-occurring concepts, sorted by mentions desc.
ast.target: 所有概念（Def）枢纽条目，包含提及次数和共现概念排名，按提及次数降序排列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Single concept by canonical slug — use sr_canonicalize first if the user provided free-form text.
ast.target: 按规范标识符获取单个概念——如果用户提供了自由文本，请先使用sr_canonicalize。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert free-form display text into the canonical slug used internally for hub lookups.
ast.target: 将自由格式的显示文本转换为用于内部枢纽查找的规范标识符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Every open question (Q-tagged span) across the vault, with note path + block id.
ast.target: 整个库中所有开放问题（Q标签跨度），包含笔记路径和块ID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cards (Def + Q) currently due for review per the FSRS scheduler.
ast.target: 根据FSRS调度器当前待复习的卡片（Def + Q）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: tag -> mention count across the whole vault.
ast.target: 标签 -> 整个库中的提及次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the markdown body of a concept hub page (Concepts/<canonical>.md).

ast.name: description
ast.source: Resolve the active domain profile and effective tag dictionary for a note path. Use to learn which sigils are valid in a given note.
ast.target: 解析笔记路径的有效域配置文件和标签字典。用于了解在给定笔记中哪些符号有效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: L2 + Pattern cards currently due, filtered by the Krashen i+1 rule. Returns coverage data, missing tokens per card, and a miss-tag histogram for the language. Notes opt in by adding `language: <code>` frontmatter; cards inherit that code via Mention.language.
ast.target: 当前待处理的L2 + 模式卡片，根据Krashen i+1规则过滤。返回覆盖率数据、每张卡片的缺失词元，以及该语言的缺失标签直方图。笔记通过添加 `language: <code>` 前置元数据选择加入；卡片通过Mention.language继承该代码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: ISO code matching the note's `language:` frontmatter (e.g. "de")
ast.target: 与笔记的 `language:` 前置元数据匹配的ISO代码（例如 \"de\"）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 返回的最大卡片数（默认50）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reading mode 1–5; defaults to the plugin's active mode
ast.target: 阅读模式1–5；默认为插件的活动模式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tags already applied in the paragraph (optional)
ast.target: 段落中已应用的标签（可选）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Every action (A-tagged span) across the vault, with note path + block id. Symmetric with sr_open_questions.
ast.target: 整个库中所有行动（A标签跨度），包含笔记路径和块ID。与sr_open_questions对称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All cards derivable from the index (Def + Q), regardless of due state. Use sr_due_cards for the review queue.
ast.target: 从索引可派生的所有卡片（Def + Q），无论是否到期。使用sr_due_cards获取复习队列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Persisted FSRS scheduling state (stability, difficulty, due date, reps, lapses) for a card id. Card ids come from sr_due_cards / sr_all_cards.
ast.target: 卡片ID的持久化FSRS调度状态（稳定性、难度、到期日期、复习次数、失败次数）。卡片ID来自sr_due_cards / sr_all_cards。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Serialize an array of segments ({text, tag?, note?, wikilink?}) back into {{Tag|…}} markup. Inverse of sr_parse_body.
ast.target: 将段落数组（{text, tag?, note?, wikilink?}）序列化回{{Tag|…}}标记。sr_parse_body的逆操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grade a due card and advance its FSRS schedule. rating: 1=Again, 2=Hard, 3=Good, 4=Easy. Persists state and rolls the day/streak counters, exactly like the review UI.
ast.target: 对到期卡片进行评分并推进其FSRS调度。评分：1=重来，2=困难，3=良好，4=简单。持久化状态并滚动天数/连续记录计数器，与复习UI完全相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wrap a verbatim span inside a paragraph with {{tag|…}} markup, ensuring the paragraph gets a stable block id. Frontmatter is preserved. Closes the loop on sr_suggest_tags: suggest → apply.
ast.target: 用{{tag|…}}标记包装段落中的逐字跨度，确保段落获得稳定的块ID。前置元数据被保留。完成sr_suggest_tags的闭环：建议 → 应用。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 从0开始的段落索引（与Mention.paraIndex匹配）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Verbatim substring of the paragraph's plain text to tag
ast.target: 段落纯文本中要标记的逐字子字符串

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ask the AI to synthesize a Markdown document from a slice of vault content, citing sources as [[Note#^block-id]]. Returns the generated text (does not write a file). Requires the Anthropic API key.
ast.target: 要求AI从库内容切片中综合一份Markdown文档，引用来源为[[Note#^block-id]]。返回生成的文本（不写入文件）。需要Anthropic API密钥。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A label for the kind of document (e.g. "Literature note")
ast.target: 文档类型的标签（例如 \"文献笔记\"）

ast.name: description
ast.source: What to produce from the slice

ast.name: description
ast.source: The vault content the model may cite (the only data it sees)
ast.target: 模型可引用的库内容（它看到的唯一数据）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reading mode 1–5; defaults to the active mode
ast.target: 阅读模式1–5；默认为活动模式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rebuild concept hub pages (Concepts/<slug>.md), the open-questions index, and per-language hubs from the current index. Creates/updates plugin-owned pages only.
ast.target: 从当前索引重建概念枢纽页面（Concepts/<slug>.md）、开放问题索引和按语言的枢纽。仅创建/更新插件拥有的页面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Export a note's tagged spans to a plain-markdown "<name>.annotated.md" sidecar next to it. Returns the written path.
ast.target: 将笔记的标记跨度导出到其旁边的纯Markdown \"<name>.annotated.md\" 伴随文件。返回写入的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path of the source note
ast.target: 源笔记的相对于库的路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Every Q-tagged span across the vault, as JSON.
ast.target: 整个库中所有Q标签跨度，以JSON格式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Raw markdown of any vault note by its vault-relative path (URL-encoded).
ast.target: 通过其相对于库的路径（URL编码）获取任何库笔记的原始Markdown。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 阅读模式1–5（默认：活动模式）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reusable prompt for synthesizing a cited Markdown document from a slice of vault content.
ast.target: 用于从库内容切片中综合一份引用Markdown文档的可复用提示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A label for the kind of document

ast.name: description
ast.source: The vault content the model may cite
ast.target: 模型可能引用的保险库内容

ast.name: description
ast.target: 来自模式调色板的符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Build a hierarchical outline for a concept from its definitions, relations, and evidence.
ast.target: 根据概念的定义、关系和证据，构建其层次化大纲。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Surface tensions, opposing views, tradeoffs, and unstated assumptions for a topic.
ast.target: 揭示一个主题的内在张力、对立观点、权衡取舍和未明言的假设。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A one-pager: who, when, where, what, and the open questions.
ast.target: 一页纸概要：谁、何时、何地、何事，以及待解问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rank the open questions across the vault and propose what to read next.
ast.target: 对保险库中的待解问题进行排序，并建议下一步阅读内容。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 大纲 (定义 → 规则 → 证据)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 钢铁人论证 (主题 / 交叉点 / 对立面 / 假设)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 学习指南 (问题 + 答案 + 记忆)

ast.name: name
ast.source: Briefing (N + D + P + key Defs + Q)
ast.target: 简报 (笔记 + 定义 + 问题 + 关键定义 + 问题)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 阅读议程 (全局开放问题)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开卡片 / 表格 / 差距视图

ast.name: name
ast.target: 为当前选区显示标签栏

ast.name: name
ast.source: AI: suggest tags for this paragraph

ast.name: name
ast.target: 从 R 标签插入关系图 (Mermaid)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 从 R 标签导出关系图 (画布)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 构建操作 MOC (兼容 Tasks 插件)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 从文件导入 Kindle 剪辑…

ast.name: name
ast.source: Sync actions to tasks app (Todoist / Things)
ast.target: 同步操作到任务应用 (Todoist / Things)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将操作导出为 ICS (日历)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 重建全库标签索引 (完全重新扫描)

ast.name: name
ast.source: Import custom tags from current note
ast.target: 从当前笔记导入自定义标签

ast.name: text
ast.source: No tags yet. Select text in the editor and press a tag letter.
ast.target: 尚无标签。在编辑器中选择文本并按一个标签字母。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No questions or notes yet. Tag with Q or attach a note to a tagged span.
ast.target: 尚无问题或笔记。使用 Q 标签或为带标签的文本段附加笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open a note to see its concept atlas.
ast.target: 打开一个笔记以查看其概念图谱。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Nodes = Def tags (deduped). Edges = two definitions co-occur in a paragraph. Thicker = more co-occurrences.
ast.target: 节点 = 定义标签 (去重)。边 = 两个定义在同一段落中共现。边越粗 = 共现次数越多。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No concepts yet. Tag spans with d (Def) in any note to populate the atlas.
ast.target: 尚无概念。在任意笔记中用 d (定义) 标记文本段以填充图谱。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No cards due. Tag some Defs / Qs in your notes and they will appear here.
ast.target: 尚无到期卡片。在笔记中标记一些定义 / 问题，它们将显示在此处。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No suggestions — model declined to tag this paragraph.
ast.target: 无建议 — 模型拒绝为此段落打标签。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Requires the AnkiConnect add-on running in Anki desktop. Run "Sync cards to Anki (AnkiConnect)" from the command palette to push Def + Q cards.
ast.target: 需要 Anki 桌面版中运行的 AnkiConnect 插件。从命令面板运行“同步卡片到 Anki (AnkiConnect)”以推送定义 + 问题卡片。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Run "Export actions to ICS (calendar)" to write a `.ics` file pairing every A-tagged action with a co-located D (date) span in the same paragraph. Subscribe to the file from Calendar.app or any ICS-aware client.
ast.target: 运行“将操作导出为 ICS (日历)”以写入一个 `.ics` 文件，将每个带 A 标签的操作与同一段落中共同定位的 D (日期) 文本段配对。从 Calendar.app 或任何支持 ICS 的客户端订阅该文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: One letter per tag. Empty = no shortcut. Built-in letters are shown as defaults; overrides take precedence.
ast.target: 每个标签一个字母。空 = 无快捷键。内置字母显示为默认值；覆盖设置优先。
